category_sources: Official Scrapy homepage calls it an open source data extraction framework: https://www.scrapy.org/
source_facts.description says Scrapy is a web crawling and scraping framework.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is scrapy; official homepage and GitHub repository use Scrapy branding: https://www.scrapy.org/
docs_sources: Official Scrapy homepage links Read the Docs as the documentation surface: https://www.scrapy.org/
Scrapy resources page labels Scrapy Docs as official API and framework documentation: https://www.scrapy.org/resources/
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is scrapy/scrapy and describes Scrapy as a web crawling and scraping framework: https://github.com/scrapy/scrapy
Official homepage links the Scrapy project: https://www.scrapy.org/
tags_sources: Official homepage describes Scrapy as an open source framework for extracting public web data: https://www.scrapy.org/
source_facts.description identifies web crawling and scraping.
